title: epics/<slug>.md frontmatter
description: Durable Epic intent. Lives in epics/<slug>.md while open and epics/done/<slug>/index.md after close/cancel. The `branch` field declares the merge policy: epic/<slug> means tickets branch off this branch and squash-merge to main on close; main means edits land on main directly.

epic_id.description: Slug-style id, mirrors v2 ticket-new conventions (looser than the historical YYMMDD-prefix TicketId).

branch.description: Branch policy. Either 'main' (main-direct: edits land on main, no branch ops) or 'epic/<slug>' (epic-branch: tickets branch off here, squash-merge on close).
